personal_access_token.description: Flexmail personal access token, used as the HTTP Basic auth password. Never logged.

account_id.description: Flexmail account id, used as the HTTP Basic auth username.

base_url.description: Flexmail API base URL override for tests or proxies.

page_size.description: Records per page for paginated endpoints (contacts, sources); 1-500.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
